meaning: n.胆小鬼,女人气的男人,胆小无用的男子adj.女人气的,柔弱的
examples: Nina looks the spitting image of Sissy Spacek.
The only boys who will talk to them now are soft-spoken and gentle, like the doctor's pretty sissy son, who ties ribbons to the poodle's curls.
He talks like he is a sissy.
As performance, it's hypnotic: Sissy, lost in a melancholy dream, savors every note of every phrase.
Last week Sissy Spacek said she was expecting "a real gullywasher" of a rainstorm.
